# jugeni-contracts test fixtures

Source: https://github.com/jugeni/jugeni-contracts

These files are vendored copies of the jugeni audit log contract fixtures.
They are used by the `internal/jugeni/` package for integration and golden-file tests.

- `decisions.jsonl` — 13 sample decision lifecycle events (v1)
- `notes.jsonl` — 7 sample note events (v1)
- `audit-log-decisions-v1.schema.json` — JSON Schema for decisions stream
- `audit-log-notes-v1.schema.json` — JSON Schema for notes stream

Last synced: 2026-06-28 from jugeni-contracts main branch.
